channel.title: dee.ink — Small CLI Tools for LLMs and Humans
channel.description: Rust CLI tools by Dmitry Kargaev. JSON output, pipe-friendly, single-purpose.

item.title: dee.ink — CLI Tools Collection by Dmitry Kargaev
item.description: Small Rust CLI tools for LLMs and humans by Dmitry Kargaev. Productivity, marketing, finance, shopping, dev tools, and data research.
